message:
fix(tools): bound results Vec on normal validate() path in evidence_replay_validator (bd-3pld)

Early-return error paths used push_bounded() but the main code path
at line 474 used raw .push(), allowing valid replay results to
accumulate unboundedly. Changed to push_bounded(MAX_RESULTS).
Regression test added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
